evaluation.comments: Boundary review only: one admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro call was made with thinking disabled, stream=false, no tools, no model substitution, and the approved source hash. The prompt asked for line-range locator candidates only; the prompt did not ask for character offsets or quote hashes. character offsets and quote hashes are deferred until Goal 12D manual strict line-range review. raw source text, provider payloads, prompt traces, model traces, and secrets are not committed. The output is proposal-only and method quality was not evaluated.
